preset.title: Qualification Preset
preset.description: Pre-configured qualification strategy. B2B BANT: company → needs → budget. B2C Service: service → scheduling → contact. Custom: define your own steps.

steps.title: Qualification Steps
steps.description: Custom qualification steps (overrides preset). Leave empty to use preset defaults.

prompt.title: Step Prompt
prompt.description: Instructions for the AI in this step

tools.title: Step-Specific Tools
tools.description: Additional MCP tools available only in this step

provider.title: CRM Provider
provider.description: Which CRM system to use for contact management

lookupBy.title: Contact Lookup Field
lookupBy.description: Which field to use for finding existing contacts

enrichmentTools.title: Enrichment Tools
enrichmentTools.description: MCP tools to run for lead enrichment on the first message (async, fire-and-forget). E.g. clearbit_lookup, research_agent.

autoHandoff.title: Auto Handoff
autoHandoff.description: Automatically hand off qualified leads (true) or wait for human approval (false)

handoffWebhookUrl.title: Handoff Webhook URL
handoffWebhookUrl.description: URL to notify when a lead is qualified and ready for handoff

systemPrompt.title: System Prompt
systemPrompt.default: You are a consultative sales assistant. Help the customer understand their problem and guide them toward a solution through natural conversation.

recursionLimit.title: Recursion Limit
recursionLimit.description: Maximum number of graph iterations (tool call loops)

availableTools.title: Available Tools
availableTools.description: Select which tools the agent can use during conversations
